docs.text: Welcome to MkDocs For full documentation visit mkdocs.org . Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs

docs.title: Commands

docs.text: mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
docs.title: Project layout

docs.text: 在 VS Code 中插入提示 方法一 输入 > [!Note]。 输入提示内容。 方法二 安装 Markdown extended 插件。 输入 !!! note，输入标题名。 另起一行，加四个空格，输入提示内容 Note 标识符（提示、示例等）需另起一行。 所有标识符需小写。
docs.title: Markdow syntax advanced
在 VS Code 中插入提示

docs.text: 输入 > [!Note]。 输入提示内容。
docs.title: 方法一

docs.text: 安装 Markdown extended 插件。 输入 !!! note，输入标题名。 另起一行，加四个空格，输入提示内容 Note 标识符（提示、示例等）需另起一行。 所有标识符需小写。
docs.title: 方法二

docs.text: Basic Syntax Italic Put two underlines "_" around the text. Example I_will_get a good job. Bold Put two asterisks "*" (preferred) or underlines "_" around the text. Example I will get a good job. [!Note] If you need to make texts both italic and bold, put two asterisks on the outside to make it more legible. For example, I will get a good job. Headers Put the same number of hash masks "#" as the size of the header level. Six levels are available. !!!example Example: # Header 1 ## Header 2 ### Header 3 #### Header 4 ##### Header 5 ###### Header 6 Links Inline links Inline links attach the links right after the link text in the Markdown file. Put a pair of square brackets "[]" around the link text and a pair of parenthesis "()" around the link. [!Note] Do not place a space between the link text and the link, otherwise the square brackets show in the rendered content. Example I will get a good job on LinkIn . Reference links Reference links allow you to put links at the end of the Markdown file so as to manage them in a unified way. The link is actually a reference to another place in the file. Put a pair of square brackets around the link text and reference text. At the end of the file, copy and paste the reference text with brackets, and then follow the right bracket with a colon and the link. !!!example Example: I will get a good job on LinkIn . [!Note] Both types of links are rendered the same way. Images Inline images Put an exclamation mark "!" before the alt text, and follow the alt text with the link in a pair of parenthesis. [!Note] Why we need alx text Users may use screen readers. Users may have limited network speed to load an image. Example The following table shows how the image is displayed in markdown. Reference images Put an exclamation mark "!" before the link text. Put a pair of square brackets around the link text and reference text. At the end of the file, copy and paste the reference text with brackets, and then follow the right bracket with a colon and the link. [!Note]Note Do not place a space between the exclamation mark and the left square bracket. Example Block quotes Put a greater than ">" caret before the quote. This is to indicate that the content is from somewhere else. After rendering, it will be dented and has a colored line at the left of the content. You can place other markdown elements in a block quote. Example The following sentence is a quote. The only thing we have to fear is fear itself. To quote multiple paragraphs in a single block quote, place > before each paragraph, including the blank line. To end a quote block, leave a blank line after it. Line breaks Hard breaks Press Enter, and put a space before the new line. Soft breaks Put two spaces after the previous line, and then press Enter. Lists Unordered lists Place a asterisk "*" before each item. Example Sun Moon Venus To insert a lower-level list, indent one asterisk more before the preceding item. Example Fruit Lemon Apple Blueberry Ordered lists Place the number before the step. Example Write markdown files. Upload file to Github. List texts Start a new line, and then indent the line by at least one space. Example Upload markdown files to Github. Make sure the files are closed.
docs.title: Basic Syntax
